text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On one of my days off, I spot Mejiro<n>Ardan with
a heap of shopping bags<n>by her feet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I think a short break is in<n>order. Perhaps
I've purchased too<n>much...
choice_data_list: That stuff looks heavy. Need a hand?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, could I trouble you? I<n>would really
appreciate it. In fact, I've<n>almost reached my
limit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much! You've been a<n>great help.
Oh, there you are! ♪ Arrrdaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, and you're with a trainer? Hiya!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we happened to cross paths a<n>little earlier.
I must have looked quite<n>tired, considering how
quickly they<n>offered to help carry my bags.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Many thanks for assisting<n>Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Um... May I offer you a drink as a<n>token of my
gratitude? I'm just about<n>to make some.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! We're having a party where<n>we all bring
ingredients for healthy<n>drinks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Did you bring that whole pile<n>of
ingredients, Ardan?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: D-did I bring too much?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You could feed an army with all this!<n>Why did you
bring so much?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, um... I found so many things that<n>I imagined
the two of you would like,<n>and I couldn't help
myself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've always been quick to get sick,<n>so I do have
some knowledge when it<n>comes to nutrition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And I've never had the opportunity to<n>actually
help my friends with this<n>knowledge, so I wanted
to be of use...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You have borne a great burden for us.<n>I rejoice
at your efforts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You're not especially fond of liver,<n>are you,
Chiyono O? I've brought<n>some cocoa powder
and mustard<n>spinach for your iron intake.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow! You remembered that I don't<n>like liver?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And I have Greek yogurt for you,<n>Yaeno! ♪ It's
low in fat and high in<n>protein, perfect for your
muscles and<n>bones.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: How is it that you know of my desireto train both my muscles andbones?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... I know more about you than<n>you could
ever know.
choice_data_list:
That just goes to show how much you love
them.

That just goes to show how much you love
them.
I see that you keep a close eye on your rivals.
I see that you keep a close eye on your rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... I know more about you than<n>you could
ever know.
choice_data_list:
That just goes to show how much you love
them.

That just goes to show how much you love
them.
I see that you keep a close eye on your rivals.
I see that you keep a close eye on your rivals.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: L-l-l-love, you say?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ Gosh, you're making us all<n>blush.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've got the perfect idea! Yaeno!<n>How's about
we think up a mixture<n>for Ardan?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That is an excellent idea. Do you have<n>any
particular preferences, Ardan?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What kind of drinks do you like?<n>Lemony ones?
Creamy? Maybe<n>something like a sports drink?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh my, so many to choose from.<n>Hehe! ♪ Well...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, the trio have fun making<n>drinks for each
other.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Love, eh? Ehehe, we feel the same<n>way too!
Right, Yaeno? ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes, indeed! Both of us...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: W-we love you, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, b-but not in a romantic way, of<n>course!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Gwahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Y-Yaeno?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki runs away in<n>embarrassment, and
we find<n>ourselves racing around looking for<n>
her...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Rivals... Yes, you're quite right.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
S-so you've already figured out what<n>our weak
points are?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Perhaps I have. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-I see... So you know our strengths<n>and
weaknesses because we're<n>rivals... If I were to
sum this up with a<n>proverb, then...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Keep your friends close, and your<n>rivals at a
party! Right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... I see?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Chiyono O's puzzling<n>proverb, Mejiro
Ardan tilts her head in<n>confusion. It looks like
everyone's<n>made their feelings for each other<n>
known.
